EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface IEnvelope

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to methods and properties of envelopes.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("1B077914-38C5-11D0-92D2-00805F7C28B0")]
public interface IEnvelope : IGeometry

Depth

The depth of the envelope.

double Depth { get; set; }

double

Defines the envelope to cover all the points.

Count int
Points IPoint

Parameters

Count int
Points WKSPoint

Expand(double, double, bool)

Moves the X and Y coordinates of the sides toward or away from each other.

void Expand(double dx, double dy, bool asRatio)

Parameters

dx double
dy double
asRatio bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

ExpandM(double, bool)

Moves the measure of the sides toward or away from each other.

void ExpandM(double dm, bool asRatio)

Parameters

dm double
asRatio bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

ExpandZ(double, bool)

Moves the Z attribute of the sides toward or away from each other.

dz double
asRatio bool

Constructs an envelope from the coordinate values of lower, left and upper, right corners.

YMin double
